name: Dark Factory issue dispatch validates before implementation
instruction: Dark Factory issue dispatch must validate GitHub issue structure before any Tessl agent implementation step can edit repository files.
relevant_when: GitHub Actions workflow file or Dark Factory operating documentation that describes issue-originated Dark Factory dispatch.
context: Issue-originated automation should stop unclear work orders before implementation so agents do not fabricate unsafe changes.
scope_reason: The workflow or operating note contains the dispatch sequence and validation gate evidence.

checklist.name: validation-before-agent-implementation
checklist.rule: The dispatch sequence includes issue-structure validation before the Tessl agent implementation step.

checklist.name: invalid-dispatch-stops-before-edits
checklist.rule: The dispatch sequence explicitly stops or reports invalid issues before repository source files are edited.
